description_long: This is a vintage-style upholstered couch with a soft, fabric covering featuring a subtle, faded blue and beige floral or damask pattern. The couch has a skirted base that conceals its legs, giving it a traditional and homey appearance. The armrests are rounded and padded, blending smoothly into the backrest, which is gently curved and continuous across the length of the couch. The seat area is wide and appears to have integrated, non-removable cushions, with no visible accent or throw pillows. On the rear side, there is a playful hand-drawn illustration and the phrase 'WITH LOVE...' in black marker, adding a unique, personalized touch. The overall structure suggests a comfortable, plush seating experience, suitable for casual urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or community spaces.
description: A vintage, skirted couch with rounded armrests, a continuous curved backrest, and faded blue-beige patterned upholstery, featuring a hand-drawn message on the back.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rounded armrest, skirted base, and the depth of the seat cushion.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide seat, continuous curved backrest, and both rounded armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the other armrest and the skirted base.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the curved backrest and a hand-drawn illustration with the phrase 'WITH LOVE...'.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Integrated seat and back cushions, no visible loose or accent pillows, cushions appear attached and continuous.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Faded blue and beige floral or damask patterned fabric, with a hand-drawn black illustration and text on the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are fully hidden by a fabric skirt, no visible design or material details.
attribute_armrest_design: Rounded, padded armrests at each end, integrated into the couch frame, same fabric as the rest of the couch.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, gently curved backrest, fully upholstered, attached and cushioned, with no visible tufting or division.
